steps.title: Spot the cause-and-effect structure
steps.content: Ahoy's naval service is presented as the reason for his historical significance. The transition must show this cause-effect link.

steps.title: Apply the causal signal
steps.content: In doing so signals that his historical prominence resulted from his naval service. The other choices sidestep the causal connection, suggest unrelated sequence, or introduce an example. That matches choice D — D is correct.
